tasks.title: Build out Contact Me page with form and design
tasks.description: Read existing Contact files (src/sections/Contact.jsx, src/sections/Contact.css, src/pages/Contact.jsx, src/pages/Contact.css) to understand current structure. Enhance the Contact section with: 1) A contact form containing name, email, and message input fields with proper HTML5 validation and error states, 2) Social/contact links section (email, LinkedIn, GitHub, or other relevant platforms), 3) Polished, modern styling that matches the design system used in other portfolio sections (Home, About, Projects). The form should handle client-side validation with visual feedback. Write or update tests in src/sections/Contact.test.jsx to cover form rendering, field validation, user interactions (typing, submission), and error handling. Ensure components are accessible (proper labels, ARIA attributes).
acceptance_criteria: Contact form displays name, email, and message fields with labels
Form validation works for required fields and email format
Social/contact links are visible and styled consistently
Styling matches the portfolio design system with proper spacing and colors
Tests written/updated cover form functionality and validation
Form shows validation errors to users appropriately

tasks.title: Validate Contact page implementation
tasks.description: Run the Contact section test suite using 'npx vitest run src/sections/Contact.test.jsx' to validate the contact form, validation logic, social links, and styling. All tests must pass with zero failures. Check that form fields render correctly, validation triggers properly, and user interactions work as expected. Report any test failures with complete error messages and stack traces.
acceptance_criteria: Form validation behaves correctly in tests
